# CLS Caribe Legal Services

> Legal services for businesses and expats in Southern Caribbean Costa Rica

## About

CLS Caribe Legal Services provides personalized legal and strategic solutions for businesses and individuals in Puerto Viejo de Talamanca and the Southern Caribbean region of Costa Rica. We specialize in helping expats navigate Costa Rica's legal system and supporting local businesses with their legal needs.

## Location

- City: Puerto Viejo de Talamanca
- Region: Limón Province, Southern Caribbean
- Country: Costa Rica
- Address: Century 21 Caribe Real Estate, across from Restaurante Rincón Porteño

## Contact

- Phone: +506 6056-5736
- Instagram: @cls_legal_cr
- Website: https://clslegalcr.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Costa Rica time, CST)

## Services

### Immigration Law
- Temporary and permanent residency applications
- Pensionado (retiree) visa assistance
- Rentista visa assistance
- Work permits
- Residency renewals
- Cédula (residency ID) processing

### Real Estate Law
- Property purchase and sale transactions
- Real estate due diligence
- Title verification
- Lease agreements
- Maritime zone (Zona Marítimo Terrestre) concessions
- Property dispute resolution

### Corporate Law
- Company formation (Sociedad Anónima, SRL)
- Commercial contracts
- Regulatory compliance
- Trademark registration
- Investment advisory
- Business licensing

### Business Consulting
- Business development strategy
- Market opportunity identification
- Strategic alliance formation
- Business expansion planning
- Local networking and introductions

## Languages

- Spanish (native)
- English (fluent)

## Areas Served

- Puerto Viejo de Talamanca
- Cahuita
- Manzanillo
- Bribri
- Sixaola
- Greater Limón Province
- All of Costa Rica (for immigration and corporate matters)

## Ideal Clients

- Expats relocating to Costa Rica
- Foreign investors purchasing property
- Entrepreneurs starting businesses in Costa Rica
- Retirees seeking pensionado residency
- Digital nomads needing legal status
- Existing businesses needing legal support

## What Makes Us Different

- Located in Puerto Viejo — we know the local market and community
- Bilingual service in English and Spanish
- Experience with expat-specific needs and challenges
- Strategic business consulting beyond traditional legal services
- Long-term relationship focus, not transactional

## Common Questions We Help Answer

- How do I get residency in Costa Rica?
- What's the process for buying property in the Caribbean?
- Can foreigners own beachfront property in Costa Rica?
- How do I start a business in Costa Rica as a foreigner?
- What visa options exist for retirees?
- How long does residency take?
- What is the maritime zone and how does it affect property purchases?
